creator: mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
text:
Update to mrtg port.  No new or removed patchfiles for this port.

portlint:
WARN: please use single whitespace right before $(Id|FreeBSD)$ tag.
0 fatal errors and 1 warnings found.
Not sure where this whitespace is.  I thought maybe it was a few spaces
before $Id so I changed it to a tab.

Fix: cvs diff: in directory .:
cvs diff: ignoring CVS/Root because it specifies a non-existent repository /host/trang.nuxi.com/FBSD/CVS-repository
cvs server: Diffing .
